title: notholaena ternifolia
intro: Notholaena ternifolia, also known as the fern fern or ferny fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae, commonly referred to as the fern family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Notholaena ternifolia include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
